metadata.title: Voytek Features Decode Should Port
metadata.title_th: ฟีเจอร์ Voytek ที่ Decode ควรเอามา
metadata.source: Reverse-engineered from bazi-calculator.com HTML (logged in user, Premium account)

1_true_solar_time_with_border_detection.status: Decode has TST, missing border detection
1_true_solar_time_with_border_detection.voytek_output: Minutes correction: -15.19 (Longitude: -18.42 + EoT: 3.23); RST=19:19; Month begins: 2026-05-05 18:46 GMT+7 (18:27 LMT). Border case - some pillars are on borderline (Month).
1_true_solar_time_with_border_detection.logic: If birth_time within ±60 minutes of solar term boundary, flag as border case. User must verify with classical reference.
1_true_solar_time_with_border_detection.decode_action: Add `border_case` flag + tolerance window to true-solar-time.js
1_true_solar_time_with_border_detection.implementation: function checkBorderCase(birthTime, tolerance_min = 60) { const nearestTerm = getNearestSolarTerm(birthTime); const distMin = Math.abs(birthTime - nearestTerm.time) / 60000; return { is_border: distMin < tolerance_min, distance_min: distMin, term: nearestTerm.name, warning: distMin < tolerance_min ? 'pillars are on borderline' : null }; }

2_fan_yin_fu_yin_detection.definition_zh: 反吟 (Fan Yin) = full clash; 伏吟 (Fu Yin) = full repeat
2_fan_yin_fu_yin_detection.voytek_output: Fan Yin (Bing Wu), Fu Yin (Gui Si)
2_fan_yin_fu_yin_detection.fan_yin_logic: Both stem AND branch clash with target pillar. e.g. Bing Wu vs Ren Zi = stem clash + branch clash = Fan Yin
2_fan_yin_fu_yin_detection.fu_yin_logic: Both stem AND branch identical to target pillar. e.g. Gui Si vs Gui Si = full Fu Yin = same energy hits twice (often distressing)

interpretation.fan_yin: Total opposition. Major upheaval, role reversal, identity crisis during this transit
interpretation.fu_yin: Total repetition. Stagnation despite effort, dejavu situations, karmic loops

3_heaven_void_with_pillar_origin.status: Decode has Kong Wang basics, missing pillar attribution
3_heaven_void_with_pillar_origin.voytek_innovation: Tracks WHICH pillar is voiding the transit
3_heaven_void_with_pillar_origin.voytek_output: heaven void (YP) — Year Pillar voids; heaven void (DP) — Day Pillar voids
3_heaven_void_with_pillar_origin.logic_extension: Standard Kong Wang uses Day Pillar's Xun. Voytek ALSO computes Year Pillar's Xun voids. Two voids = double effect.
3_heaven_void_with_pillar_origin.decode_action: Extend kong_wang detector to compute both DP and YP void branches, label which voided which

4_HHS_dominant_qi_DHHS.definition_zh: 藏干司令 Dominant Hidden Heavenly Stem
4_HHS_dominant_qi_DHHS.concept: Within the month branch, ONE hidden stem 'rules' based on the 30-day sub-period (initial qi 7-9 days, middle qi 5-7 days, residual qi 16-18 days)
4_HHS_dominant_qi_DHHS.purpose: Determines TRUE day master strength — born in 子 month (癸 main qi), but if born in initial 9 days, the residual 戊 from previous 亥 month still rules!

5_qi_phase_per_pillar.concept: Each pillar has its OWN 12 phases reading (not just Day Master)
5_qi_phase_per_pillar.voytek_output: DM Qi phase + DHHS Qi phase + Pillar Qi phase
5_qi_phase_per_pillar.use_case: Tells if each pillar's stem is rooted/dying/peak in its own branch — micro-level chart strength analysis

6_HS_HHS_combination.definition: When natal Heavenly Stem combines with the Hidden Heavenly Stem in luck pillar (or vice versa), forming a TRANSFORMATION when conditions support it
6_HS_HHS_combination.example_aeaw_2026: 甲(year HS) + 己(LP HHS hidden in 巳 from 辛巳 LP) = combine → Earth (good for 己 weak DM!)
6_HS_HHS_combination.implementation: Check 5 stem combos against any hidden stem in transit branch

7_navigation_views.status: Decode has Action Mode but lacks views
voytek_views: Day view (zoom to single day with hours)
100 Years view (ALL 10 LPs in one table)
7_navigation_views.decode_action: Build view-toggle component. 100 Years view is killer — entire life on one screen

8_chart_type_classification.voytek_output: Chart type (approximation): Strong / Possible special chart: Transformation type (earth)
8_chart_type_classification.logic: Auto-classify into 16 normal + special types (Follow Wealth, Follow Power, Solo Strength, Transformation Earth/Metal/Water/Wood/Fire)
8_chart_type_classification.decode_action: Already have structures-16.json — just connect to runtime detection

9_fan_yin_in_luck_pillars.implication: When luck pillar is identical to a natal pillar, that natal pillar's themes REPEAT. Fan Yin in LP = 10 years of opposition.
9_fan_yin_in_luck_pillars.trader_application: MAJOR red flag for entering Fan Yin LP — restructure life BEFORE pillar transitions

10_interactive_hover_highlighting.status: Decode can do better with React
10_interactive_hover_highlighting.voytek_implementation: show3('p1','p6','x','p5') = highlight stem-1 + stem-6 + transformation product stem-5 on hover
10_interactive_hover_highlighting.decode_advantage: React state can show MORE — not just highlight but show the formula and impact score

100_year_view.value: Entire life trajectory on one screen — 10 LPs × 10 years each = 100 years all at once
100_year_view.decode_strategy: Make this FREE in Decode (Voytek charges for it). Massive differentiator.

famous_charts_database.decode_strategy: Build similar but with TRADER focus — 100 famous traders/CEOs (Buffett, Soros, Dalio, Musk, etc.). Compare your chart to successful market figures.

search_by_pillar_combination.voytek_use: Find all celebrities with 己亥 day pillar, etc.
search_by_pillar_combination.decode_strategy: Add same — 'Find traders with similar charts to mine' = retention hook

search_by_chart_type.examples: Search Three Marvel (San Qi), Commander Nobleman (Kui Gang), Follow Wealth charts
search_by_chart_type.decode_strategy: Decode-exclusive: Search by Action Mode pattern (e.g., 'Show charts that consistently L1 EXECUTE in Fire years')

voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.1_no_AI_layer: Voytek shows raw symbols/codes (HS, EB, HHS, Fr, EG, IR, RW...) — beginners can't decode. Decode has AI translation.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.2_dated_UI: 2010-era PHP design, Monda font, table-based layouts. Decode = 2026 Bloomberg aesthetic.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.3_no_action_mode: Voytek is descriptive ('here's what happened') not prescriptive ('here's what to do'). Decode L1-L6 fills this gap.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.4_no_hourly_scoring: Voytek shows hour pillars but no scoring. Decode scores every 2-hour window with go/no-go.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.5_no_multi_chart_compatibility: Can't compare 2 people's charts side-by-side automatically. Decode compatibility scoring is unique.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.6_no_QMDJ_BaZi_integration: QMDJ and BaZi are separate calculators. Decode unifies them in one decision engine.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.7_no_real_time_dashboard: Static PHP page — no live updates. Decode = real-time with WebSocket-driven Liu Shi updates.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.8_no_mobile_first: Desktop-only design with awkward mobile fallback. Decode = mobile-native PWA.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.9_no_export_to_trading: Cannot export 'good Fire days' to trading calendar/Outlook. Decode = export to Apple Calendar / Google Calendar / Notion.
voytek_weaknesses_decode_can_exploit.10_polish_solo_dev_no_team: 14 years run by Voytek alone. No content marketing, no community, no influencers. Decode + Aeaw's metaphysics network = community moat.
